threads: redesigning the customer onboarding flow (originally called signup-v2, renamed mid-session to customer-onboarding-revamp)
pricing tier restructuring from 3-tier to 4-tier model
integrating Stripe billing portal with custom domain
building usage analytics dashboard for product team
refactoring email service from Mailgun to Postmark

messages.content: Six tracks today: customer onboarding revamp (used to be called signup-v2), pricing tier restructuring, Stripe billing portal, product analytics dashboard, email migration to Postmark, and GDPR data export. Walk through each.
Kicking off signup-v2 today — Figma link?
Figma is at https://figma.com/file/aBcD3fGhI4j/onboarding-revamp. signup-v2 covers the whole post-signup flow up to first value.
New pricing tiers are starter $49/mo, pro $199/mo, business $499/mo, enterprise custom. PR target?
PR #897 will introduce the 4-tier model: starter $49/mo, pro $199/mo, business $499/mo, enterprise custom. Coordinated with Stripe portal change.
Stripe portal custom domain?
billing.moltaicorp.com — DNS configured, Stripe verified. Stripe account is acct_1OqB7zE2k9jX4mPp.
Analytics dashboard for product — datasource?
Reading from molt-analytics-prod.aurora.us-east-1. Dashboard lives at https://dashboards.moltaicorp.com/product-usage-v2.
Email migration plan — Mailgun out by when?
Mailgun EOL date is 2026-06-15. Postmark server token in place: pm-server-token-2026-05. Cutover via mail.moltaicorp.com.
GDPR export endpoint?
GET /api/v2/users/{id}/data-export. Returns a signed URL into s3://moltai-gdpr-exports-prod with 24h TTL.
Quick rename — let us call this customer-onboarding-revamp from now on. signup-v2 is too narrow.
Got it. Renaming the thread from signup-v2 to customer-onboarding-revamp. PR will land as #892.
Effective date?
New customers get 4-tier starting next Monday. Existing on grandfathered 3-tier until next renewal.
SSL?
Stripe provisions the cert automatically once DNS resolves. Already green on billing.moltaicorp.com.
Refresh cadence?
Hourly aggregations from raw events. Dashboard at https://dashboards.moltaicorp.com/product-usage-v2 refreshes on access.
Sender domain?
mail.moltaicorp.com is the new transactional domain. SPF, DKIM, DMARC all configured for Postmark.
How many PII columns covered?
47 PII columns across 12 tables — full coverage per the data inventory.
Reference both names in the PR description so search works?
Yes — PR #892 will mention both customer-onboarding-revamp (current name) and signup-v2 (legacy name) in the description.
Marketing copy locked?
Locked. starter $49/mo, pro $199/mo, business $499/mo. Enterprise stays custom.
Test transaction?
Ran a $1 charge through the portal under acct_1OqB7zE2k9jX4mPp. Refunded immediately. Flow works end-to-end.
Access control?
Product team SSO group only. PII redacted at the SQL view layer.
Volume sanity check?
Postmark plan handles up to 300k/month. Current peak about 180k. Well within limits.
Encryption?
KMS-encrypted at rest. Signed URL valid 24h. Bucket is s3://moltai-gdpr-exports-prod with object-lock for compliance hold.
Open questions on pricing tier restructuring from 3-tier to 4-tier model?
None outstanding right now. State as previously summarized.
